# meshstack_api_key (Ephemeral Resource)

Creates an ephemeral API key and exposes its token during a Terraform run.

## Example Usage

```terraform
ephemeral "meshstack_api_key" "example" {
  workspace_identifier = "my-workspace"
  name                 = "temporary-api-key"
  authorities = [
    "workspace.read",
    "project.read"
  ]
  expiry_date = "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `authorities` (List of String) Authorities assigned to the API key.
- `expiry_date` (String) Expiry date of the API key in RFC3339 format.
- `name` (String) Name of the API key.
- `workspace_identifier` (String) Identifier of the workspace that owns the API key.

### Read-Only

- `created_on` (String) Creation timestamp of the API key.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) Token of the created API key.
- `uuid` (String) UUID of the created API key.
